NOK by Alara: NOK by Alara is an upscale, contemporary African and Afro-fusion fine dining restaurant in Victoria Island featuring innovative twists on traditional West African dishes, set within a visually striking art gallery indoor space and an elegant, bamboo-framed garden terrace. Price Range: ₦25,000 – ₦50,000. Spice Level: Medium to High. Dietary: High Protein, Halal options. Channels: Dine-in, Direct Booking.
Yellow Chilli: Yellow Chilli is a premier gourmet traditional Nigerian and pan-African restaurant celebrated for its premium presentation of native delicacies, legendary party Jollof rice, seafood okra soup, and fiery local pepper soups. Price Range: ₦12,000 – ₦25,000. Spice Level: Very High. Dietary: High Protein, Pescetarian friendly. Channels: Chowdeck, Bolt Food, Dine-in.
Terra Kulture Food Lounge: Terra Kulture Food Lounge is a culturally immersive heritage hub and restaurant that serves authentic, generous portions of indigenous Nigerian staples like pounded yam, efo riro, and village rice in an artistic, celebratory local atmosphere. Price Range: ₦8,000 – ₦18,000. Spice Level: High. Dietary: Traditional Swallow, Meat-heavy. Channels: Dine-in, Bolt Food.
Ile Eros: Ile Eros is an elegant, high-end modern Nigerian fine dining restaurant led by Chef Eros, specializing in haute-cuisine interpretations of classic street foods, refined local soups, and premium catering experiences. Price Range: ₦30,000 – ₦60,000. Spice Level: Medium (Adjustable). Dietary: Gourmet, No Pork. Channels: WhatsApp, Direct Booking.
Ofada Boy: Ofada Boy is a vibrant, casual cultural restaurant heavily focused on local street food heritage, serving massive value-for-money portions of native Ofada rice in leaves, spicy peppered goat meat asun, and fresh palm wine with excellent delivery app infrastructure. Price Range: ₦5,000 – ₦12,000. Spice Level: Very High. Dietary: No Pork options, High Carb/Protein. Channels: Chowdeck, Bolt Food, WhatsApp.
Z Kitchen: Z Kitchen is an upscale, premium contemporary steakhouse and fine dining restaurant in Victoria Island featuring expert wood-fired grills, dry-aged beef steaks, global Mediterranean-inspired cuisine, premium wines, and a sleek modern architectural interior. Price Range: ₦35,000 – ₦70,000. Spice Level: Mild to Medium. Dietary: High Protein, Low Carb, No Pork options. Channels: Dine-in, Direct Web.
SLoW Lagos: SLoW Lagos is a sophisticated, high-end farm-to-table restaurant located at Temple Muse, offering global comfort food, Latin American flavors, wood-fired cooking, and artisanal mixology within a lush, botanical oasis indoor-outdoor setting. Price Range: ₦30,000 – ₦55,000. Spice Level: Medium. Dietary: Organic, Gluten-free options, Vegetarian friendly. Channels: Dine-in.
Shiro Lagos: Shiro Lagos is a luxury, high-end Pan-Asian and Japanese restaurant and beachfront lounge featuring premium sushi, sashimi, dim sum, and spicy wok-tossed Singapore noodles, set against dramatic, towering interior architecture and ocean views. Price Range: ₦25,000 – ₦55,000. Spice Level: Medium to High. Dietary: Seafood, Pescetarian, No Pork options. Channels: Chowdeck, Dine-in.
Danfo Bistro: Danfo Bistro is a quirky, casual urban eatery celebrating everyday Lagos street culture, uniquely styled around the iconic yellow transit bus and serving quick-service local sliders, Ewa Aganyin variations, and street food favorites. Price Range: ₦4,000 – ₦10,000. Spice Level: High. Dietary: Street food, Casual. Channels: Chowdeck, Bolt Food.
Glover Court Suya: Glover Court Suya is a legendary, long-standing local open-air kitchen dedicated entirely to authentic street-style grilled meats, serving perfectly spiced beef suya, ram suya, and kidneys tossed in intense traditional yaji dry pepper blends. Price Range: ₦3,000 – ₦8,000. Spice Level: Very High. Dietary: Pure Protein, Keto, No Pork. Channels: WhatsApp, Chowdeck, Takeaway.
Blackbell: Blackbell is a popular, high-speed fast-casual multi-cuisine restaurant serving reliable, budget-friendly, and large portions of everyday local staples, smoky Jollof rice, quick pasta boxes, and fresh pastries built for rapid daily delivery. Price Range: ₦4,000 – ₦9,000. Spice Level: Medium to High. Dietary: Standard, Halal. Channels: Chowdeck, Bolt Food, Proprietary App.
Craft Gourmet by Lou Baker: Craft Gourmet by Lou Baker is a chic, cozy boutique cafe and bistro specializing in fresh artisanal pastries, Mediterranean-inspired light lunches, comforting weekend brunches, specialty coffees, and healthy vegetarian-friendly options. Price Range: ₦10,000 – ₦22,000. Spice Level: Mild. Dietary: Vegetarian, Bakery, Low Calorie options. Channels: Dine-in, WhatsApp.
The House Lagos: The House Lagos is a unique social house, cocktail lounge, and continental restaurant styled like a chic residential home, emphasizing shared group platters, interactive dinner parties, and a high-energy evening nightlife crowd. Price Range: ₦20,000 – ₦45,000. Spice Level: Medium. Dietary: Continental, Shareables. Channels: Dine-in.
RSVP Lagos: RSVP Lagos is a high-end, minimalist American-style upscale bistro and cocktail lounge featuring sleek industrial architecture, house-made pastas, premium gourmet beef burgers, custom mixology, and a sophisticated poolside dining terrace. Price Range: ₦25,000 – ₦50,000. Spice Level: Mild to Medium. Dietary: High Protein, American Comfort. Channels: Dine-in, Direct Pickup.
Ocean Basket VI: Ocean Basket VI is a popular, casual international seafood restaurant chain specializing in massive, shared family-style platters of fried or grilled fish, prawns, calamari, chips, and signature garlic sauces with high delivery efficiency. Price Range: ₦12,000 – ₦28,000. Spice Level: Mild (With hot sauce options). Dietary: Pescetarian, Seafood. Channels: Chowdeck, Bolt Food, Dine-in.
Izanagi: Izanagi is an intimate, premier Japanese restaurant known for its consistent, high-quality execution of authentic sushi rolls, fresh sashimi, hot teppanyaki grills, and a peaceful, zen-inspired dining ambiance. Price Range: ₦25,000 – ₦50,000. Spice Level: Mild (Wasabi extra). Dietary: Pescetarian, Low Carb options. Channels: Dine-in, WhatsApp.
La Veranda: La Veranda is a sophisticated, elegant fine dining Italian restaurant serving classic handmade wood-fired pizzas, rich pasta dishes, slow-cooked risottos, and fine wines overlooking a quiet, romantic poolside terrace. Price Range: ₦20,000 – ₦40,000. Spice Level: Mild. Dietary: Vegetarian friendly, Carbs. Channels: Dine-in.
Cactus Restaurant: Cactus Restaurant is a massive, iconic waterfront family restaurant and bakery featuring a sprawling outdoor terrace facing the lagoon, an enormous international menu, fresh desserts, and dedicated kid-friendly play spaces. Price Range: ₦10,000 – ₦25,000. Spice Level: Varied. Dietary: Multi-cuisine, Family friendly. Channels: Dine-in, Direct Delivery.
Rora Lagos: Rora Lagos is a high-energy luxury Japanese-Mediterranean fusion restobar and nightlife hotspot featuring sleek gold-accented decor, premium sushi platters, vibrant fusion sliders, creative signature cocktails, and late-night resident DJs. Price Range: ₦30,000 – ₦65,000. Spice Level: Medium. Dietary: Fusion, High Protein. Channels: Dine-in.
The Ona: The Ona is an exclusive, progressive chef-owned boutique restaurant celebrating avant-garde Nigerian gastronomy with innovative multi-course tasting menus, molecular culinary experimentation, and rare local ingredient reductions at an intimate chef's table. Price Range: ₦60,000 – ₦120,000. Spice Level: Dynamic. Dietary: Fine Dining Tasting Menu. Channels: Direct Pre-booking Only.
Burg Co. is a trendy, fast-paced gourmet burger joint serving premium smash burgers, loaded fries, and thick milkshakes. Known for rapid turnaround and heavy packaging optimized for delivery apps. Price Range: ₦6,000 – ₦14,000. Spice Level: Medium. Dietary: High Protein, Comfort Food. Channels: Chowdeck, Bolt Food.
Orchid House: Orchid House is a serene, long-standing authentic Thai restaurant tucked away in a residential corner of Ikoyi, serving classic green curries, pad thai, and fiery tom yum soups in an understated garden setting. Price Range: ₦15,000 – ₦30,000. Spice Level: Very High. Dietary: Vegetarian options, Pescetarian. Channels: Dine-in, WhatsApp.
Hard Rock Cafe Lagos: Hard Rock Cafe Lagos is a sprawling, high-octane American beachfront restaurant and entertainment venue offering massive portions of classic ribs, burgers, and cocktails alongside live music memorabilia and Atlantic ocean breezes. Price Range: ₦18,000 – ₦35,000. Spice Level: Mild. Dietary: American, High Protein. Channels: Dine-in, Chowdeck.
Salma's Lebanese Restaurant: Salma's Lebanese Restaurant is an authentic, high-quality Middle Eastern dining experience specializing in freshly baked flatbreads, velvety hummus, mixed charcoal grills, and traditional hot and cold meze platters perfect for group sharing. Price Range: ₦12,000 – ₦25,000. Spice Level: Mild. Dietary: Halal, Vegetarian friendly. Channels: Dine-in, Bolt Food.
Tarkwa Cafe: Tarkwa Cafe is a relaxed, bohemian beachside spot serving fresh coconut water, grilled fish straight off the boat, local wraps, and light bites to surfers and beachgoers. Price Range: ₦4,000 – ₦9,000. Spice Level: Medium. Dietary: Pescetarian, Light eating. Channels: Dine-in Only.
